root: ^The line to Laï is now open! Linking the capital will be a tough job but since it's only the first day the traffic should stay light
^But don't underestimate it! To help you with traffic, you can now place signal lights
^Once placed, used the configuration tool to switch them on and off, use them to better handle passages and prevent collisions
^We are expecting a bit less than a dozen train today, from Ariëta and Ësie and going to Sörena and Laï
